series_metadata.series_description: Grants or cooperative agreements where the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) is the prime or sub-recipient of federal or state funding. Records include, but are not limited to, grant applications and supporting documents, award and acceptance forms, quarterly reports, progress reports explaining use of funds, financial reports, time and effort reports from consultants, correspondence, and copies of documents such as financial records, personnel record for individuals reimbursed under the award, and contracts for work performed.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from date of notification by awarding agency that grant has been programmatically and fiscally closed or single year audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Paper: from date of notification by awarding agency that grant has been programmatically and fiscally closed or single year audit report is released, whichever is later. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
